We use Reverse Vision as our loan origination software, so your LOs would need to follow the below steps to download the software. They will also need logins, so if any of them don’t already have it, let me know.
 
Also, www.rfswholesale.com has a lot of helpful information if they click on “Resources” and enter password “Wholesale18”. Let me know if you have any questions!
 
Instructions on how to DL the software:
Click the following link to download the installation file http://admin.reversevision.com/setup/setup.exe
Click Save
On your keyboard Press Windows key + E to open Windows Explorer
Open the Download folder
Right-click on the setup.exe file
Select Run as administrator
Follow the prompts
